summary: Design a layer, Aether, that propagates service requests both ways between Karnataka's Single Window System (SWS) and the legacy department systems using the Unique Business Identifier (UBID) as the common join key.
optimization_claims: Makes updates flow in both directions smoothly
No need to change existing systems
Finding changes fast with SHA-256 hashes and event IDs based on UBID and payload
Self-healing mechanism keeps data accurate and consistent over time
constraints_addressed: Data loss in case of failures
